svg.text: LIV TR → LIVING TRUST, REV → REVOCABLE
CORPORATION → CORP, L L C → LLC
Collapse single letters: J V S → JVS
(skip IN, CO — ambiguous with common words)
Strip NAME_SUFFIXES (JR,SR,II…) → Acronym check (CSC=Corp Service Co → 95)
Direct JW | Sorted-tokens JW | Compact-alnum JW → best_jw = max(all three)
If compact_jw ≥ 0.95 → floor at compact_jw (handles compound words)
Bookend bonus: first+last tokens match (exact/initial/JW≥0.85) → coeff ≥ 0.90
score = best_jw × (0.3 + 0.7 × overlap_coeff) → round to nearest 5
POST OFFICE BOX / P.O. BOX / POB → PO BOX
PO BOX ONE → PO BOX 1 | COUNTY ROAD → CR
Full address JW × (0.6 + 0.4 × city_sim) | Penalties: nums −0.10, zip −0.20
Strip all date patterns (JUNE 14 2012, 6-27-2022, 1999, 01/2020) before extracting nums
All similarity: max( JW(normalized), JW(compact_alnum) ) → round to nearest 5
LIKELY BA MATCH — SSN MATCH NAME MISMATCH
SSN matched but name too different — needs review
↑ SSN matched (EXISTING BA) | No SSN match (NEW BA) ↓
Regex on Canvas name AND matched DEC name:
TRUST | TRUSTEE | TRUSTEES | TTEE | LIVING TRUST
FAMILY TRUST | REVOCABLE TRUST | IRREVOCABLE TRUST
is_trust = 1 if either name matches regex
Decision Priority (checked top-to-bottom, first match wins)
API Override: name_score 15–50 with SSN match → send to Claude Sonnet → override score → reclassify
avg < 40 → check name≥45 & addr≤30 → either NAME MISMATCH or NEW ADDRESS (name override)
same_address=True → EXISTING ADDRESS | 4. addr_score ≥ 75 → LIKELY SAME ADDRESS
else → NEW ADDRESS | No SSN / Invalid SSN / No DEC match → NEW BA categories
All scores rounded to nearest 5 before output · Human review required — no auto-merge
